title: Definition of Elite Engineers is Changing
summary: Alex Kantrowitz offers commentary on the shifting definition of what constitutes an elite engineer. The piece suggests that traditional qualifications and benchmarks for engineering excellence are changing, likely in response to the evolution of AI and tech industry practices.
